title: Iranians Reject Trump’s Offer for Cease-Fire but Signal Openness to Talks
summary_full: Iran does not want a momentary pause in the fighting, fearing that Israel and the United States would use that opportunity to beef up their forces before resuming strikes.
summary_public: Iran does not want a momentary pause in the fighting, fearing that Israel and the United States would use that opportunity to beef up their forces before resuming strikes.

IL.label: neutral
IL.evidence: fearing that Israel and the United States would use that opportunity

IR.label: negative
